newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent catalyst was Q3 FY2026 results on May 14 (revenue CAD64.8M, raised FY2026 outlook to +22.5%-30% revenue, more vCMTS/DOCSIS 4.0 wins), all pre-window. The +1.6% move since June 9 is noise.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered supply chain: small, underfollowed broadband/fiber-access play with DOCSIS 4.0/vCMTS momentum, but the AI-node tie is indirect (edge backhaul, not compute bottleneck). No news since June 9; raised guidance was May 14. Hold at 39.
verdicts.bull: Underfollowed micro-cap; raised FY26 guidance, expanding vCMTS Tier-1 trials and new EU wins ride a multi-year cable upgrade cycle.
verdicts.neutral: Real broadband-access franchise but only a loose, indirect AI-node connection; revenue lumpy quarter to quarter.
verdicts.bear: $0.22B cap, cable-capex cyclical, not a true AI-compute bottleneck; AI-node placement is a stretch.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: vCMTS/DOCSIS 4.0 deployment ramp from qualification to volume
